core_mechanism: order-by-order cancellation of a perturbative (Taylor-in-time) series expansion of an error/decay functional by tuning a sequence of control-timing parameters, where each additional control operation nulls the next-higher term in the expansion
brief_reason: The abstract states that each added pulse cancels successive orders of a time expansion of the fidelity decay, with delay times chosen to satisfy the resulting equations independently of the underlying Hamiltonian.
